{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Nakothi’s dead island
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The stench in the courtyard is like [[Nakothi’s dead island]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
